name: 11L XSA-all(11) + GPTQ-lite + EMA(0.997) + Late QAT@0.15 + Raw Binary
blurb: 11 layers with XSA on ALL layers (not just last 4), GPTQ-lite optimal clip percentile search, EMA(0.997) + Tight SWA, Late QAT int6-all at LR scale<0.15, Partial RoPE(16/64), LN Scale, VE128(layers 9,10), SmearGate, BigramHash(2048), raw binary+zstd22 serialization. Mean of 3 seeds: 1.12676 (std 0.00034). No pruning, no TTT.
author: gowtham0992
